title: Fix Chainlink/crosslink naming mismatch across curriculum
description: The curriculum consistently refers to the issue tracker as 'Chainlink' with install command 'cargo install chainlink-tracker' and a '.chainlink/' folder (02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md lines 118-170, 03-real-world-skills/01-the-workshop.md:102, 04-proving-it/01-on-your-own.md:37, 04-proving-it/03-the-portfolio-review.md:73). The actual tool is 'crosslink' — binary name 'crosslink', folder '.crosslink/', commands 'crosslink quick', 'crosslink session start', etc. A novice following the docs will run 'cargo install chainlink-tracker' and either install the wrong crate or fail. Fix: global find-and-replace Chainlink→crosslink throughout curriculum, update install command to match the real binary, update folder references to .crosslink/, verify all example commands match the real CLI.
